productDisplayName: Puma Women's Move Graphic Logo White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite V-neck t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with mega sleeves, snipped edge neckline, glittery graphic on the front and cat logo embroidered on the back below necklineFittingRegularWash Care Gentle machine wash with similar colours in lukewarm water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Wash and iron inside out Flat dry in shade Look cool this summer in this white tee from puma. The cat logo graphic on the front gets a dose of glam with the glittery lines, while the stretchable cotton fabric not only allows you a snug, customised Fit, but also keeps you fresh all day. Team this with denim shorts and canvas shoes for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
